candidate_check.description: The Red Hat Enterprise Linux operating system must use a separate file system for /var.

check_content_excerpt:
Verify that a separate file system/partition has been created for "/var".

Check that a file system/partition has been created for "/var" with the following command:

# grep /var /etc/fstab
UUID=c274f65f    /var                    ext4    noatime,nobarrier        1 2

If a separate entry for "/var" is not in use, this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Migrate the "/var" path onto a separate file system.
title: The Red Hat Enterprise Linux operating system must use a separate file system for /var.
